_comment: Maps Contentstack user UIDs to display names for the CMS→GitHub pull PR body. The CMA has no endpoint to resolve an arbitrary user UID to a name using a stack management token (only an org-level authtoken can, which isn't something we provision for CI). To add yourself: log in to Contentstack, call GET /v3/user with your personal authtoken (Authorization header, no api_key needed) and use the returned user.uid, or ask a teammate with org access to look it up for you.
bltdca6ba951efe37c6: TODO: fill in with the real name once known
